lessons.title: The For-In Loop ➰
lessons.description: Repeat tasks easily and count through ranges of numbers.

lessons.title: The While Loop ⏳
lessons.description: Keep code running until a condition changes.

lessons.title: Repeat-While Loop 🔄

lessons.title: Break and Continue 🛑
lessons.description: Take full control over your loops by skipping or escaping them.
